data.name: The Sex Curse 💋
data.detailed_description:
The Sex Curse💋 是一款混合了喜劇、恐怖和辛辣成人內容的點擊式視覺小說。本遊戲充滿了荒謬的情節、黑色幽默，以及大量向經典恐怖系列作品致敬的元素，所有這些都帶有俏皮、誘人的轉變。
。
故事一開始，主角和他們的朋友前往鬼屋度周末。聽起來像是個完美的逍遙之旅，對吧？錯了。當他們不慎觸發了一個古老的儀式時，事情發生了轉變，主角受到了咒語的詛咒，而這個咒語真的會招惹麻煩。
。
從瘋狂的跟蹤者到鬼魂，這是一個不停的過山車混亂。幸運的是，主人公有一項特殊的「才能」--每個人，我是說每個人，都無法抗拒地被他們吸引。這種魅力會幫助他們在詛咒中生存，還是只會造成更多的戲劇？

[遊戲特色：[/b］

  • 扭轉的喜劇恐怖：期待過度的幽默、戲仿的氛圍，以及對經典恐怖套路的引用。
  • 辛辣的成人內容： 以大膽的場面、煽情的時刻和冒失的互動為特色，與故事完美交織。
  • 古怪的角色： 從壞蛋怪物獵人到誘人的鬼魂和危險的惡棍，每個人都有自己的氣質。
    [點選遊戲： 探索陰森恐佈的地點，避開致命陷阱。
  • 活動畫廊： 在藝廊中隨時重溫您最喜愛的場景。
    [互動式故事： 您的選擇會影響人際關係、情節曲折以及遊戲的結局。
    。
    準備好迎接歡笑、混亂和一點點的熱情吧。The Sex Curse💋將讓您目不轉睛（也許還會臉紅一下）！

data.short_description: The Sex Curse 💋 是一款辛辣的喜劇恐怖視覺小說，包含點擊元素。一位不幸的英雄觸發了古老的詛咒，引來鬼魂、纏擾者和超自然的混亂。以魅力（和美貌）為武器，在狂野的遭遇中生存、解謎，並塑造您的故事！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Sex Curse 💋
data.detailed_description:
The Sex Curse💋 is a wild mix of comedy, horror, and spicy adult content wrapped into a point-and-click visual novel. It’s packed with ridiculous situations, dark humor, and plenty of nods to iconic horror franchises—all with a playful, seductive twist.

The story kicks off when the main character and their friends head to the haunted house for a weekend of fun. Sounds like a perfect getaway, right? Wrong. Things take a turn when they accidentally trigger an ancient ritual, cursing the protagonist with a spell that literally attracts trouble.

From crazy stalkers to ghosts it’s a non-stop rollercoaster of chaos. Luckily, the hero’s got one special “talent”—everyone, and I mean everyone, is irresistibly drawn to them. Will this charm help them survive the curse or just cause even more drama?

Game Features:

  • Comedy-horror with a twist: Expect over-the-top humor, parody vibes, and references to classic horror tropes.
  • Spicy adult content: Featuring bold scenes, flirty moments, and risqué interactions seamlessly woven into the story.
  • Quirky characters: From badass monster hunters to seductive ghosts and dangerous villains, everyone’s got their own vibe.
  • Point-and-click gameplay: Explore eerie locations and avoid deadly traps.
  • Event Gallery: Relive your favorite scenes anytime in the gallery.
  • Interactive story: Your choices shape relationships, plot twists, and the game’s ending.

    Get ready for laughs, chaos, and a little bit of heat. The Sex Curse💋 is here to keep you on your toes (and maybe blush a little)!

data.short_description: The Sex Curse 💋 is a spicy comedy-horror visual novel with point-and-click elements. An unlucky hero triggers an ancient curse, attracting ghosts, stalkers, and supernatural chaos. Armed with charm (and good looks), survive wild encounters, solve puzzles, and shape your story!
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
